sdegeo:create-circle.description: Creates a 2D circular region. When optional start-angle and end-angle are specified, a circular arc is generated.

parameters.name: center-pos
parameters.desc: Center position of the circle `(position x y z)`

parameters.name: start-angle
parameters.desc: Optional start angle in degrees for a circular arc

parameters.name: end-angle
parameters.desc: Optional end angle in degrees for a circular arc

sdegeo:create-cone.description: Creates a circular cone (or elliptical cone if ratio and position3 are specified). Supports both `(position ...)` and bare xyz syntax for axis endpoints.

parameters.name: start-axis
parameters.desc: Base position of the cone `(position x y z)` or bare `x y z`

parameters.name: end-axis
parameters.desc: Top position of the cone `(position x y z)` or bare `x y z`

parameters.name: ratio
parameters.desc: Optional ratio between major and minor axes for elliptical cone

parameters.name: position3
parameters.desc: Optional point defining the major axis direction for elliptical cone

sdegeo:create-cuboid.description: Creates a solid block (3D cuboid) defined by two diagonal corner positions.

parameters.name: diagonal1
parameters.desc: First diagonal corner `(position x y z)`

parameters.name: diagonal2
parameters.desc: Opposite diagonal corner `(position x y z)`

sdegeo:create-cylinder.description: Creates a cylinder (or elliptical cylinder if ratio and position3 are specified). Supports both `(position ...)` and bare xyz syntax for endpoints.

parameters.name: start-pos
parameters.desc: Start position of the cylinder axis

parameters.name: end-pos
parameters.desc: End position of the cylinder axis

parameters.name: ratio
parameters.desc: Optional ratio between major and minor axes for elliptical cylinder

parameters.name: position3
parameters.desc: Optional point defining the major axis direction for elliptical cylinder

sdegeo:create-ellipse.description: Creates a 2D elliptical region. position1 is the center, position2 is the endpoint of the major axis, ratio is the major/minor axis ratio.

parameters.name: position1
parameters.desc: Center of the ellipse `(position x y z)`

parameters.name: ratio
parameters.desc: Ratio of major to minor axes (can be > 1)

sdegeo:create-ellipsoid.description: Creates a 3D ellipsoid. position1 is the center, position2 is the endpoint of the major axis, ratio is the major/minor axis ratio.

parameters.name: position1
parameters.desc: Center of the ellipsoid `(position x y z)`

parameters.name: ratio
parameters.desc: Ratio of major to minor axes (can be > 1)

sdegeo:create-linear-edge.description: Creates a linear edge between two positions. Returns an EDGE entity.

sdegeo:create-ot-ellipsoid.signature: (sdegeo:create-ot-ellipsoid center-position major-axis-position ratio truncate-angle-1 truncate-angle-2 region-material region-name)
sdegeo:create-ot-ellipsoid.description: Creates an oriented and truncated ellipsoid with flat top and bottom at specified cut-off angles.

parameters.name: major-axis-position
parameters.desc: Endpoint of the major axis of the untruncated ellipsoid

parameters.name: ratio
parameters.desc: Ratio of major to minor axes

sdegeo:create-ot-sphere.signature: (sdegeo:create-ot-sphere center-position orientation radius truncate-angle-1 truncate-angle-2 region-material region-name)
sdegeo:create-ot-sphere.description: Creates an oriented and truncated sphere with flat top and bottom. The orientation vector defines the pole direction.

parameters.name: orientation
parameters.desc: Normal vector of the truncated top/bottom `(gvector xv yv vz)`

sdegeo:create-polygon.description: Creates a 2D polygonal region defined by a list of vertex positions. The polygon is automatically closed if the first and last vertices differ.

sdegeo:create-polyline-wire.description: Creates a polyline wire body consisting of linear edges only. Has no material or region attribute; useful for sweep operations.

sdegeo:create-prism.signature: (sdegeo:create-prism centerposition height major-radius minor-radius nsides region-material region-name)
sdegeo:create-prism.description: Creates a solid prism with nsides sides (>= 3). Centered about centerposition with height along z-axis.

parameters.name: height
parameters.desc: Height along the z-axis (0 creates a sheet face)

sdegeo:create-pyramid.signature: (sdegeo:create-pyramid centerposition height major-radius minor-radius nsides top region-material region-name)
sdegeo:create-pyramid.description: Creates a solid pyramid with nsides sides (>= 3). The `top` parameter specifies the major axis length at the top.

parameters.name: top
parameters.desc: Major axis length at the top of the pyramid

sdegeo:create-rectangle.description: Creates a rectangular region defined by two diagonal corner positions.

parameters.name: pos2
parameters.desc: Diagonally opposite corner position `(x y z)`

sdegeo:create-reg-polygon.description: Creates a 2D regular polygonal region defined by center, radius, and optional number of sides and rotation angle.

parameters.name: angle
parameters.desc: Optional rotation angle in degrees (counterclockwise from x-axis)

sdegeo:create-ruled-region.description: Creates a 2D ruled region between two existing edges. The edges cannot intersect each other.

sdegeo:create-sphere.description: Creates a sphere centered at a specified position. Supports both `(position ...)` and bare xyz syntax.

parameters.name: center-position
parameters.desc: Center position `(position x y z)` or bare `x y z`

sdegeo:create-spline-wire.description: Creates a spline wire body from a list of vertex positions. Has no material or region attribute; useful for sweep operations.

sdegeo:create-torus.signature: (sdegeo:create-torus {center-position | {cx cy cz}} major-radius minor-radius region-material region-name)
sdegeo:create-torus.description: Creates a solid torus in the xy plane. Shape depends on radius ratio: donut (major > minor), apple (major < minor), or lemon (major < 0).

parameters.name: center-position
parameters.desc: Center position `(position x y z)` or bare `x y z`

parameters.name: major-radius
parameters.desc: Distance from center to spine curve; sign determines shape

sdegeo:create-triangle.description: Creates a 2D triangular region defined by three vertex positions.

sdegeo:extrude.description: Extrudes 2D bodies into 3D in the positive z-direction. Use `"all"` to extrude the complete model.

parameters.name: extrusion-depth
parameters.desc: Depth of extrusion in the positive z-direction

sdegeo:mirror-selected.description: Reflects entities using a transform:reflection-type transform object. Replaces the obsolete `sdegeo:reflect`.

parameters.name: keep-flag
parameters.desc: `#t` keeps original bodies; overlapping bodies are merged

parameters.name: reverse-DRS-flag
parameters.desc: Optional; `#t` reverses doping/Ref/Eval directions before mirroring

sdegeo:reflect.description: Reflects entities across a plane defined by a base position and direction vector. **Obsolete** — use `sdegeo:mirror-selected` instead.

parameters.name: base-vector
parameters.desc: Direction vector of the reflection plane

sdegeo:revolve.description: Revolves entities about an axis defined by a base position and direction vector through the specified angle.

parameters.name: base-position
parameters.desc: Point about which the revolve is performed

sdegeo:rotate-selected.description: Rotates entities using a transform:rotation-type transform object. Supports optional repeat count and overlap control rules.

parameters.name: entity-list
parameters.desc: Body or list of bodies to rotate

parameters.name: keep-flag
parameters.desc: Optional; `#t` keeps originals and enables repeat/overlap options

parameters.name: repeat-number
parameters.desc: Optional; number of rotation repetitions (requires keep-flag `#t`)

parameters.name: overlap-rule
parameters.desc: Optional: `#t` auto-remove overlaps, `#f` disable, or `"ABA"`/`"BAB"` for specific rule

sdegeo:align-horizontal.description: Aligns the specified vertices to a horizontal line at the given y-coordinate. For 2D models only.

parameters.name: align-position
parameters.desc: Y-coordinate of the horizontal alignment line

sdegeo:align-horizontal-aut.description: Aligns the specified vertices to a horizontal line at their average y-coordinate. For 2D models only.

sdegeo:align-to-line.description: Aligns the specified vertices to a line defined by two points by projecting them onto it. For 2D models only.

parameters.name: pos1
parameters.desc: First point defining the alignment line

parameters.name: pos2
parameters.desc: Second point defining the alignment line

sdegeo:align-vertical.description: Aligns the specified vertices to a vertical line at the given x-coordinate. For 2D models only.

parameters.name: align-position
parameters.desc: X-coordinate of the vertical alignment line

sdegeo:align-vertical-aut.description: Aligns the specified vertices to a vertical line at their average x-coordinate. For 2D models only.

sdegeo:bool-intersect.description: Intersects the first body with the rest. Result inherits material and region from the first body.

parameters.name: body-list
parameters.desc: List of bodies; first body is intersected with the rest

sdegeo:bool-subtract.description: Subtracts the first body from the rest in the list. Result inherits material and region from the first body.

parameters.name: body-list
parameters.desc: List of bodies; first body is subtracted from the rest

sdegeo:bool-unite.description: Performs a Boolean unite on the specified body list. Result inherits material and region from the first body.

sdegeo:chamfer.description: Performs 3D edge or vertex chamfering with the specified chamfer distance.

parameters.name: edge | vertex-list
parameters.desc: Edge, or list of vertices to chamfer

parameters.name: adaptive-chamfering
parameters.desc: Optional; if #t, retries with smaller distances on failure

sdegeo:chamfer-2d.description: Performs a 2D chamfering operation on specified vertex or vertices.

sdegeo:check-overlap.description: Checks for overlaps between geometric bodies. Returns null if none, or a list of overlapping body pairs.

parameters.name: use-bbox-check
parameters.desc: Optional; #t (default) uses fast bounding-box check, #f for precise check

sdegeo:chop-domain.description: Cuts the 3D device to cover only the specified polygonal base in the z-direction. Device bottom must be on the xy plane.

parameters.name: point-pairs
parameters.desc: List of x,y coordinate pairs defining the polygon, e.g. (list 0 0 2 2 6 0)

sdegeo:delete-collinear-edges.description: Deletes collinear edges by merging neighboring collinear edges into a single-edge entity.

sdegeo:delete-contact-boundary-edges.description: Removes the active contact set attribute from all edges of the specified regions.

parameters.name: body | body-list
parameters.desc: Optional body or body list; if omitted, applies to all

sdegeo:delete-contact-boundary-faces.description: Deletes a contact attribute from all faces of the specified body or bodies.

sdegeo:delete-contact-edges.description: Deletes the current contact set attributes from the selected edges.

sdegeo:delete-contact-faces.description: Removes the contact attribute from specified faces.

sdegeo:delete-contact-set.description: Deletes the specified contact set and removes corresponding contact attributes.

parameters.name: contact-name
parameters.desc: Name of the contact set to delete

parameters.name: cs-name
parameters.desc: Name of the coordinate system to delete

sdegeo:delete-edges.description: Removes the specified edges from the model. Default 90-degree angular tolerance protects features.

parameters.name: angular-tolerance
parameters.desc: Optional maximum angle in degrees for edge removal

sdegeo:delete-nearly-collinear-edges.description: Deletes nearly collinear edges where midpoint distance between two edges is closer than dist.

sdegeo:delete-region.description: Deletes the specified region(s), including Ref/Eval window bodies, permanently from the model.

parameters.name: bodies
parameters.desc: Body or list of bodies to delete

sdegeo:delete-short-edges.description: Deletes all edges from the list that are shorter than the specified maximum length.

parameters.name: max-edge-length
parameters.desc: Edges shorter than this value are deleted

sdegeo:delete-vertices.description: Removes the specified vertices from the model. Shared vertices must be selected from all bodies.

sdegeo:delete-work-plane.description: Deletes the specified work plane. The global work plane "base" cannot be deleted.

parameters.name: wp-name
parameters.desc: Name of the work plane to delete

sdegeo:fillet.description: Performs 3D edge or vertex rounding with constant-radius fillet.

parameters.name: edge | vertex-list
parameters.desc: Edge, or list of vertices to fillet

parameters.name: adaptive-filleting
parameters.desc: Optional; if #t, retries with smaller radii on failure

sdegeo:fillet-2d.description: Rounds the specified vertex or vertices in 2D models.

sdegeo:get-active-work-plane.description: Returns the name of the active work plane as a string.

sdegeo:get-auto-region-naming.description: Returns the status of the automatic region-naming option (#t or #f).

sdegeo:get-contact-edgelist.description: Returns all edges with the specified contact set name as a 2d-contact attribute.

sdegeo:get-contact-facelist.description: Returns all faces with the specified contact set name as a 3d-contact attribute.

sdegeo:get-current-contact-set.description: Returns the name of the current (active) contact set.

sdegeo:get-default-boolean.description: Returns the default Boolean behavior: "AB", "ABA", "BAB", "ABiA", "ABiB", or "XX".

sdegeo:get-region-counter.description: Returns the current region counter value used for automatic region naming (Region_N).

sdegeo:set-active-coord-sys.description: Sets the specified coordinate system as the active one for subsequent geometry creation.

sdegeo:set-active-work-plane.description: Sets the specified work plane as the active one for subsequent geometry creation.

sdegeo:set-auto-region-naming.description: Switches on or off the automatic region-naming option.

sdegeo:set-contact.description: Attaches the active contact to specified entities. Pass "remove" to detach.

sdegeo:set-contact-boundary-edges.description: Defines all boundary edges of the specified regions as contacts using the active contact set.

sdegeo:set-contact-boundary-faces.description: Attaches a contact attribute to each face of the specified body using the active contact set.

sdegeo:set-contact-edges.description: Marks all edges in the list as contacts belonging to the specified contact set.

sdegeo:set-contact-faces.description: Attaches a contact attribute to specified faces using the active contact set name.

sdegeo:set-contact-faces-by-polygon.description: Imprints polygons on existing faces and attaches a 3D contact attribute to the imprinted segments.

parameters.name: polygon-list
parameters.desc: List of polygons defined by position lists

parameters.name: normal-list
parameters.desc: List of normal gvectors, one per polygon

sdegeo:set-current-contact-set.description: Sets the name of the current (active) contact set.

parameters.name: csName
parameters.desc: Contact set name to make active

sdegeo:set-default-boolean.description: Sets the default Boolean behavior for overlapping regions: "AB", "ABA", "BAB", "ABiA", "ABiB", or "XX".

sdegeo:set-region-counter.description: Sets the region counter explicitly. Next generated region will be Region_N.

sdegeo:set-region-counter-aut.description: Automatically sets the region counter to the next available number by scanning existing Region_N attributes.

sdegeo:move-2d-regions.description: Moves the specified regions to a new location by the given gvector. For 2D models.

parameters.name: body | body-list
parameters.desc: Body or list of bodies to move

sdegeo:move-edge.description: Moves the specified edge to a new location by the given gvector.

sdegeo:move-vertex.description: Moves the specified vertex or vertex list to a new location given by a position or gvector.

sdegeo:scale.description: Scales entities with specified factors. Obsolete — use sdegeo:scale-selected instead.

parameters.name: scale-z
parameters.desc: Optional Z-axis scaling factor (2D only if omitted)

sdegeo:scale-selected.description: Scales entities using a transform:scaling-type transform object.

parameters.name: transform
parameters.desc: A (transform:scaling sx sy sz) transform object

sdegeo:sweep.description: Creates a sheet or solid body by sweeping a profile face along a path (wire, distance, vector, or axis).

parameters.name: path | distance | vector | axis
parameters.desc: Sweep definition: wire, numeric distance, gvector, or (position . gvector) axis

parameters.name: sweep-options
parameters.desc: Optional sweep options (solid, draft angle, etc.)

sdegeo:sweep-corner.description: Performs a sweep producing a shape containing a solid angle, defined by a sweep axis (position + gvector).

parameters.name: face | face-list
parameters.desc: Face or list of faces to sweep

parameters.name: position
parameters.desc: Start point of the sweep axis

sdegeo:split-insert-device.description: Splits a device at a specified position and inserts a part between the split bodies. For 2D and 3D devices.

parameters.name: splitpos
parameters.desc: Position where the device is split

sdegeo:split-solid.description: Splits a solid body into two parts using a cutting plane defined by a base position and normal vector.

parameters.name: plane-normal
parameters.desc: Normal vector of the cutting plane

sdegeo:translate.description: Translates entities by the specified xyz distance. Obsolete — use sdegeo:translate-selected instead.

parameters.name: translate-z
parameters.desc: Optional Z-axis translation distance (2D only if omitted)

sdegeo:translate-selected.description: Translates entities using a transform:translation-type transform object. Supports repeat and overlap control.

parameters.name: transform
parameters.desc: A (transform:translation dx dy dz) transform object

parameters.name: keep-flag
parameters.desc: #t keeps originals and enables repeat option

sdegeo:2d-cut.description: Extracts a 2D rectangular part from a 2D device, specified by two opposite corners.

parameters.name: p1
parameters.desc: First opposite corner of the rectangle

parameters.name: p2
parameters.desc: Second opposite corner of the rectangle

sdegeo:3d-cut.description: Cuts a 2D slice from a 3D device, defined by a base point and a normal vector to the cut plane.

parameters.name: base-position
parameters.desc: Base point of the cut plane

parameters.name: normal-vector
parameters.desc: Normal vector to the cut plane

parameters.name: tr-xy
parameters.desc: Transform the 2D cut to the xy plane (optional, default #f)

parameters.name: tr-record
parameters.desc: Record the rotation and translation transform (optional, default #f)

parameters.name: tr-axisaligned
parameters.desc: Trigger new transformation rules for axis-aligned cuts (optional, default #f)

sdegeo:average-edge-length.description: Computes the length of each edge in the edge list and returns the average edge length.

sdegeo:body-trim.signature: (sdegeo:body-trim x0 y0 z0 x1 y1 z1)
sdegeo:body-trim.description: Trims all bodies to the specified box, removing parts that lie outside.

parameters.name: x0
parameters.desc: Minimum x-coordinate of the trim box

parameters.name: y0
parameters.desc: Minimum y-coordinate of the trim box

parameters.name: z0
parameters.desc: Minimum z-coordinate of the trim box

parameters.name: x1
parameters.desc: Maximum x-coordinate of the trim box

parameters.name: y1
parameters.desc: Maximum y-coordinate of the trim box

parameters.name: z1
parameters.desc: Maximum z-coordinate of the trim box

sdegeo:break-nearly-axis-aligned-edges.description: Breaks nearly axis-aligned linear edges into horizontal or vertical components by inserting additional vertices and staircase edges. Applies to 2D models only.

parameters.name: angular-tolerance
parameters.desc: Minimal angle in degrees permitted between edges and x/y axes (optional, default 5 degrees)

sdegeo:chull2d.description: Computes the 2D convex hull of the specified position list and returns it as a POSITION LIST. Input must be at the xy plane with z=0.

parameters.name: position-list
parameters.desc: List of positions at the xy plane (z-coordinate must be 0)

sdegeo:contact-sets.description: Returns the names of all the defined contact sets as a Scheme list.

sdegeo:curve-intersect.description: Returns the intersection positions of the specified curves.

sdegeo:define-3d-contact-by-polygon.description: Defines a 3D face contact by imprinting a general polygon wire to an existing body, splitting its faces to create a polygonal contact area.

parameters.name: pos-list
parameters.desc: POSITION LIST containing the vertices of the imprinted polygon; must be closed (first position repeated as last)

parameters.name: dir-vector
parameters.desc: GVECTOR specifying the direction in which the polygon is projected for the imprint step

parameters.name: contact-name
parameters.desc: STRING specifying the name of the contact set

sdegeo:define-contact-set.description: Defines a contact set name and initializes the supporting data (edge thickness, color, and face pattern).

parameters.name: edgeThickness
parameters.desc: Optional edge thickness for 2D edge contacts (default 4.0)

parameters.name: Color
parameters.desc: RGB color object with three real-number arguments in [0,1], e.g. (color:rgb 1.0 0.0 0.0)

parameters.name: facePattern
parameters.desc: Face pattern string for 3D face contacts: "solid", "###", "||", "==", "//", "::", "<><", "[]"

sdegeo:define-coord-sys.description: Creates a new coordinate system in the active work plane, with origin at (x-pos, y-pos) relative to the work plane origin, rotated by angle degrees.

parameters.name: cs-name
parameters.desc: Coordinate system name; the created CS is named awp_cs-name

parameters.name: x-pos
parameters.desc: x-coordinate of origin relative to active work plane

parameters.name: y-pos
parameters.desc: y-coordinate of origin relative to active work plane

parameters.name: angle
parameters.desc: Rotation angle in degrees; counterclockwise is positive

sdegeo:define-work-plane.description: Creates a new work plane with the given name, origin, x-axis direction, and y-axis direction; z-axis is defined by the right-hand rule.

parameters.name: x-axis
parameters.desc: Point defining the x-axis direction from origin

parameters.name: y-axis
parameters.desc: Point defining the y-axis direction from origin

sdegeo:del-short-edges.description: Deletes linear edges shorter than the specified edge-length; ridges can be protected by angular-tolerance based on vertex normal difference. Applies to 2D models only.

parameters.name: entity
parameters.desc: The geometric entities from which short edges are removed

parameters.name: edge-length
parameters.desc: Edges shorter than this value are deleted

parameters.name: angular-tolerance
parameters.desc: If vertex normal difference exceeds this value, the vertex and adjoining edges are protected from deletion

sdegeo:distance.description: Returns the distance between two vertices.

sdegeo:dnce.description: Deletes nearly collinear edges from a 2D model.

parameters.name: angular-tolerance
parameters.desc: Angular tolerance in degrees; edges with normals differing less than this value are removed

sdegeo:extend-device.description: Extends a device around its axis-aligned perimeter (2D only).

sdegeo:face-find-interior-point.description: Finds an interior point on a face and returns a position object.

sdegeo:find-closest-edge.description: Finds the entity ID of the closest edge to the specified position.

parameters.name: position
parameters.desc: A position specifying the reference point

sdegeo:find-closest-face.description: Finds the entity ID of the closest face to the specified position.

parameters.name: position
parameters.desc: A position specifying the reference point

sdegeo:find-closest-vertex.description: Finds the entity ID of the closest vertex to the specified position.

parameters.name: position
parameters.desc: A position specifying the reference point

sdegeo:find-touching-faces.description: Finds all touching faces from a given face or face list; returns face pairs of input face and its neighbor.

parameters.name: flist
parameters.desc: A single face or a list of faces

sdegeo:find-touching-faces-global.description: Finds all touching faces globally; returns a list of neighboring face IDs for each input face that has neighbors.

parameters.name: flist
parameters.desc: A single face or a list of faces

sdegeo:imprint-circular-wire.description: Splits boundary faces by imprinting a circular wire to the model.

parameters.name: center-position
parameters.desc: The center of the circular wire body

parameters.name: radius
parameters.desc: The radius of the circular patch

sdegeo:imprint-contact.description: Imprints all 3D face contacts to the neighboring touching faces.

sdegeo:imprint-polygonal-wire.description: Splits boundary faces by imprinting a polygonal wire to the model.

parameters.name: vertex-list
parameters.desc: List of positions defining the polygon vertices. The polygon must be closed (first position repeated as last)

sdegeo:imprint-rectangular-wire.description: Splits boundary faces by imprinting a rectangular wire to the model.

parameters.name: position1
parameters.desc: First opposite corner of the rectangle

parameters.name: position2
parameters.desc: Second opposite corner of the rectangle

sdegeo:imprint-triangular-wire.description: Splits boundary faces by imprinting a triangular wire to the model.

sdegeo:insert-vertex.description: Inserts a vertex in a 2D model by projecting the specified insert position to the nearest edge.

parameters.name: vertex-list
parameters.desc: Vertex list specifying the insert positions

sdegeo:max-edge-length.description: Returns the length of the longest edge in the given edge list.

sdegeo:min-edge-length.description: Returns the length of the shortest edge in the given edge list.

sdegeo:point-entity-relationship.description: Returns the containment relationship between a body and a point: "inside", "boundary", or "outside".

parameters.name: body
parameters.desc: The body to test containment against

sdegeo:polygonal-split.description: Splits a 2D device along the specified path defined by a position list.

parameters.name: plist
parameters.desc: Position list defining the split path. First and last positions snap to the closest boundary edge

sdegeo:prune-vertices.description: Merges neighboring edges by pruning vertices whose edge normals are within the angular tolerance (2D models only).

parameters.name: body-list | edge-list | vertex-list
parameters.desc: The list of bodies, edges, or vertices on which to operate

parameters.name: angular-tolerance
parameters.desc: Angular threshold in degrees. Edges with normals differing by less than this value are merged

sdegeo:ray-test.description: Returns the positions where a ray intersects a solid as pairs of (ENTITY . POSITION), sorted along the ray direction.

parameters.name: entity
parameters.desc: A solid body to test intersection against

parameters.name: ray
parameters.desc: A ray consisting of a position and a direction, e.g. (ray (position ...) (gvector ...))

parameters.name: radius
parameters.desc: Tolerance radius for the ray intersection test

parameters.name: oldContName
parameters.desc: Name of the contact set to rename

sdegeo:skin-wires.description: Creates a sheet body that interpolates a series of wires or faces.

parameters.name: body-list
parameters.desc: List of wire bodies or face bodies defining cross sections to interpolate

parameters.name: path
parameters.desc: Optional wire defining a path curve intersected with each profile plane

sdegeo:skin-wires-guides.description: Creates a sheet body that interpolates a series of wires or faces with a guide curve.

parameters.name: body-list
parameters.desc: List of wire bodies or face bodies defining cross sections to interpolate

parameters.name: guides
parameters.desc: Edge list defining guide curves that the skinning surface directly follows

sdegeo:skin-wires-normal.description: Creates a sheet body that interpolates a series of wires or faces with take-off vectors normal to the plane of the wire body.

parameters.name: body-list
parameters.desc: List of wire bodies or face bodies defining cross sections to interpolate

sdegeo:skin-wires-vectors.description: Creates a sheet body that interpolates a series of wires with take-off vectors as constraints.

parameters.name: body-list
parameters.desc: List of wire bodies or face bodies defining cross sections to interpolate

parameters.name: SPAvector-list
parameters.desc: List of gvector take-off vectors controlling the direction the skin surface leaves each profile

parameters.name: magnitude-list
parameters.desc: Optional list of real magnitudes controlling the take-off strength

sdegeo:taper-faces.description: Tapers an array of faces about a point and a supplied draft vector by a given draft angle.

parameters.name: face-list
parameters.desc: List of faces of the body to be tapered

parameters.name: point
parameters.desc: A position on the taper plane

parameters.name: normal
parameters.desc: Normal of the taper plane at the specified point

sdegeo:vsmooth.description: Two-dimensional boundary smoothing using polynomial least squares fit.

parameters.name: polynomial-degree
parameters.desc: Polynomial order for the fit (2 for quadratic, 3 for cubic)

parameters.name: vertex-list
parameters.desc: List of vertices to be smoothed

sde:min-x.description: Returns the minimum x-coordinate of the specified body or body-list.

parameters.name: body | body-list
parameters.desc: A body or body-list to query.

sde:min-y.description: Returns the minimum y-coordinate of the specified body or body-list.

parameters.name: body | body-list
parameters.desc: A body or body-list to query.

sde:min-z.description: Returns the minimum z-coordinate of the specified body or body-list.

parameters.name: body | body-list
parameters.desc: A body or body-list to query.

sde:pick-point-on-wp.description: Selects a point on the view window and returns its global xyz coordinates as a position entity.

sde:pick-two-points-on-wp.description: Selects two points on the view window and returns their global xyz coordinates as a list of two position entities.

sde:save-model.description: Saves all information about a model including geometry (ACIS .sat), mesh commands, defined parameters, and TDR boundary file.

parameters.name: file-name
parameters.desc: The base file name for saving model files.

sdesnmesh:interpolate.description: Sets the parameters used in the Interpolate section of the mesh command file.

sdesnmesh:iocontrols.description: Sets the parameters used in the IOControls section of the mesh command file.

sdesnmesh:qualityreport.description: Sets the parameters of the QualityReport section of the Sentaurus Mesh command file.

parameters.name: qrelements
parameters.desc: List of DATEX materials or region names (not used for "Global")

sdesnmesh:tensor.description: Replaces the Tensor section of the mesh command file with the given string without syntax-checking.

parameters.name: value
parameters.desc: Raw string content for the Tensor section; double quotes must be escaped with backslash

sdesnmesh:tools.description: Replaces the Tools section of the mesh command file with the given string without syntax-checking.

parameters.name: value
parameters.desc: Raw string content for the Tools section; double quotes must be escaped with backslash

sdesp:begin.description: Begins Sentaurus Process and Sentaurus Structure Editor boundary-merging mode (3D only).

sdesp:define-step.description: Loads a .sat file and merges it with the current geometry, associating a step name for reproduction in Sentaurus Process.

parameters.name: file-name
parameters.desc: Path to the .sat file to load

sdesp:finalize.description: Completes boundary merging and writes a Sentaurus Process Tcl file with the recreate_step procedure.

parameters.name: Tcl-file-name
parameters.desc: Path of the output Tcl file

sdesp:restore-state.description: Restores the internal state of Sentaurus Process and SDE boundary-merging to permit restarting from a saved point.

parameters.name: step-name-list
parameters.desc: List of step names in the correct order to restore
